sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date DateTime, description String);
SELECT id, description FROM test_dates WHERE NOT LIKE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM event_date), '2022');
SELECT id, description FROM test_dates WHERE NOT LIKE(CONCAT('Event on ', toString(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_date))), 'Event on 1%');
SELECT id, description FROM test_dates WHERE NOT LIKE(EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_date), '1%') AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM event_date) < 12;
CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, text_value String);
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE NOT LIKE(text_value, '%456%') AND LENGTH(text_value) > 5;
CREATE TABLE test_complex (id Int32, start_date DateTime, end_date DateTime);
SELECT id FROM test_complex WHERE NOT LIKE(EXTRACT(DAY FROM start_date), '0') AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM end_date) = 0;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE NOT LIKE(CONCAT('Day: ', toString(EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_date))), 'Day: 1%') AND event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM event_date) AS event_year FROM test_dates) AS yearly_events WHERE NOT LIKE(toString(event_year), '20%');

SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE NOT LIKE(CONCAT(toString(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_date)), '-', toString(EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_date))), '1-1%') GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_date) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
